# Test nested struct conversion

exec sourcereflect -pretty -type Article article.go
cmp stdout expected.json

-- article.go --
package main

type Article struct {
	ID       string   `json:"id"`
	Title    string   `json:"title"`
	Author   Author   `json:"author"`
	Comments []Comment `json:"comments,omitempty"`
}

type Author struct {
	Name  string `json:"name"`
	Email string `json:"email"`
}

type Comment struct {
	ID   string `json:"id"`
	Text string `json:"text"`
}

-- expected.json --
{
  "type": "object",
  "title": "Article",
  "properties": {
    "author": {
      "type": "object",
      "title": "Author"
    },
    "comments": {
      "type": "array",
      "items": {
        "type": "object",
        "title": "Comment"
      }
    },
    "id": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "title": {
      "type": "string"
    }
  },
  "required": [
    "id",
    "title",
    "author"
  ]
}
